---
applyTo: "assignments/**/*.md"
---

# 📘 Assignment Markdown Structure Guidelines

All assignment markdown files should follow the template structure specified in this document.

## Template Structure

Every assignment `README.md` must follow this format:

### 1. Title
```markdown
# 📘 Assignment: [Assignment Title]
```
- Use a short, descriptive name (e.g., `Python Basics`, `Loops and Conditionals`, `Functions and Modules`)
- Always include the 📘 icon

### 2. Objective
```markdown
## 🎯 Objective

[Brief description of what the student will build or accomplish]

**Skills practiced:** [Comma-separated list of skills]
```
- Write 1-2 sentences summarizing what the student will learn
- List the key programming concepts or skills being practiced
- Always include the 🎯 icon

### 3. Tasks
```markdown
## 📝 Tasks

### 🛠️ [Task Title]

#### Description
[Clear description of what needs to be done]

#### Requirements
Completed program should:

- [Specific, measurable requirement]
- [Specific, measurable requirement]
- [Specific, measurable requirement]
```
- Each task must have a descriptive, action-oriented title
- Include a clear Description of what the student must implement
- List Requirements as specific, measurable outcomes
- Provide code examples and sample input/output when helpful
- Always use 🛠️ for task headers

## Guidelines

- Do not remove or skip required sections
- Keep descriptions clear and student-friendly
- Make requirements measurable and testable
- Use code blocks for technical examples
- Maintain consistent formatting and icon usage throughout
